current_html:
§ 600.205 Federal awarding agency review of risk posed by applicants.

Use of 2 CFR 200.205 (the DOS review of risk posed by applicants) is required for all selected competitive and non-competitive awards.
diff_html:
2 paragraphs changed · 2 additions · 2 deletions

Use of 2 CFR 200§ 600.205 (the DOS review of risk posed by applicants) is required for all selected competitive and non-competitive awards.

[Redesignated as § 600.206]
